# Pitch Deck Outline

## Problem

The legal services market is fragmented. Small firms lack affordable document assembly tools. Existing solutions target enterprise clients and price out solo and small-firm practitioners. The result is a two-tier system where only the well-resourced can operate efficiently.

## Solution

A platform that automates routine legal document assembly for small firms. Templates are jurisdiction-aware. Users can customise clauses without leaving the product. The pricing model is per-document rather than per-seat, matching how small firms actually bill their clients.

## Market Size

TAM: $5B across North America. SAM: $800M serving firms under 10 lawyers. SOM: $50M reachable in the first 24 months of operations, assuming focused geographic rollout.

## Traction

Closed-beta trials with 12 firms across Ontario and British Columbia. Weekly active rate of 8 out of 12. Average time-to-first-document under 15 minutes.
